result.stdout:
Description:
  Detects test projects in the specified solution.

Usage:
  Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.TestProjectDetector [options]

Options:
  --solutionFilePath <solutionFilePath> (REQUIRED)  The path to the solution file (.sln or .slnx).
  --version                                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                    Show help and usage information
